resources.string: Sign in to continue with your Google account.
Ready to keep your phone cleaner?
Sign in at the bottom to sync your archive and notes across devices.
Cloud archive saves app details, icon snapshot, categories, and notes. It does not back up app APKs or in-app user data. Reinstall opens the Play Store listing for that app.
Many apps are useful but rarely used. They still add storage usage, background activity, notification noise, and home-screen clutter. Decluttr helps you keep only what you need installed now.
Think of your phone like a desk: you only work with a few books at a time. Keep the rest on a shelf. Decluttr lets you uninstall and archive context so useful apps are remembered, not lost.
After searching many options, you might find one great PDF merger or niche tool. Add notes like \"best for merging scanned docs\" so future you remembers why it was worth keeping.
Find rarely used apps, bulk uninstall, and archive their details to cloud for quick recall later. Decluttr stores context, not the full app. When needed, jump to Play Store and reinstall in seconds.
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Already have an account? Sign In
Email and password cannot be empty
Add a quick reminder for future you
No note yet. Add one to remember why you kept this app.
Notes are saved to your archive and synced when cloud sync is available.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s from the archive?
Add context now, find it faster later
%1$d apps archived and ready for review
Quick notes improve future decisions when you revisit your archive.
Tip: add one short reason per app, like “Needed for travel” or “Work backup”.
Decluttr uses app usage access to identify rarely used apps and show cleanup recommendations. This data is processed on your device and is not required for basic archive features.
Use Discover to find rarely used and large apps, then archive before uninstalling so you can restore context later. Open Settings anytime for export, import, and appearance options.
Apps are archived after uninstalling to keep your context and notes.
Please login to view or archive apps.
No archived apps match your current search.
Try changing search or sort to discover more apps.
No high-impact cleanup targets right now
%1$d high-impact candidates identified from usage and size
%1$d high-impact candidates identified from app size
%1$d rarely used apps are ready to archive
Enable Usage Access to find archive-ready apps
Great set to archive now. Keep your phone clean and your app memory intact.
Good archive candidates here. Keep useful apps remembered without clutter.
Small archive wins now will keep clutter low later.
Archive little by little to stay organized.
Enable Usage Access to discover apps you can archive and still remember.
